name: Malayan Flour Mills Bhd
summary: Malayan Flour Mills Berhad is an investment holding company with subsidiaries involved in flour milling, poultry integration, feed milling, and aquaculture. The company manufactures and sells wheat flour and related products, operates poultry farms, produces animal feed, and engages in aquaculture activities. Malayan Flour Mills Berhad is based in Malaysia.
